CHBE697 Protein Engineering (3 Credits)

Covers the fundamentals of protein engineering and its applications

in medicine, chemical processes, and energy. Topics will include the structure and function of biological molecules, rational design and directed evolution, construction of protein and peptide libraries, protein screening platforms, methods for characterizing structure and function of biological molecules. Scientific literature will be used to highlight key discoveries and current work in protein engineering.

Cross-listed with: BIPH697.

Jointly offered with: CHBE497.
